violations.text: The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine.. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2025
